✦

AWS Intern - ACTIVE

Learn by playing — choose your vibe

✦
01
☁️🏃 Cloud Runner

An endless runner that teaches real AWS services while you dodge and dash.

  • Dodge obstacles while collecting AWS service orbs
  • Answer quiz gates that scale with your score
  • Learn about S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, and 20+ services
  • Compete for high scores while actually learning
Endless Runner AWS Services Quizzes
▶ PLAY CLOUD RUNNER
 02
🧩🚀 Intern Block Blast

A puzzle game to master your internship skills — one block at a time.

  • Time management — deep work, prioritization, batching
  • AI tools — prompting, verification, rubber-duck debugging
  • Design docs — one-pagers, non-goals, getting feedback
  • Networking — coffee chats, mentors, intern communities
Puzzle Internship Tips Quizzes
▶ PLAY BLOCK BLAST
 03
🎒🗺️ Onboarding Quest

A platformer that guides you through your first weeks — collect resources, unlock access.

  • Collect gems to unlock real onboarding resources
  • Earn keycards to open gated zones
  • Grab power-ups like Cloud Desktop and Coffee boosts
  • Explore Lobby, The Gap, and Campus for bonus stars
Platformer Onboarding Resources
▶ PLAY ONBOARDING QUEST
Built for interns, by interns ★
